top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Iran framework signed but not delivered
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump will meet his G7 counterparts as his memorandum of understanding with Iran goes under the microscope with other world leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agreement Secures Continued Rail Ferry Service from Sweden to Germany
top_signals.summary: Stena Line has signed an agreement with the Swedish Transport Administration (Trafikverket) that secures the continued operation of rail ferry services between Sweden and Germany. The agreement, the first of its kind, ensures that traffic on…
